title: feat: add ElevenLabs SFX + Multilingual v2; correct ElevenLabs TTS pricing
author: ElliotEtag
pr_body_excerpt:
Adds two ElevenLabs audio models and corrects ElevenLabs TTS pricing across the board.

### New models
- **`eleven-sfx`** â€” text â†’ sound effects (`eleven_text_to_sound_v2`). New `generateSoundEffect()` handler on the audio dispatch. `GET /audio/{text}?model=eleven-sfx` and `POST /v1/audio/speech`. Supports `duration` (0.5â€“30s), `loop`, `prompt_influence`. Aliases: `sfx`, `sound-effects`.
- **`eleven-multilingual-v2`** â€” stable, lifelike TTS (`eleven_multilingual_v2`, 29 languages); registry-only (flows through `generateSpeech`). Aliases: `multilingual-v2`, `eleven-v2`.

### Pricing â€” corrected to measured cost
Measured actual credit consumption on our Scale account (the API discounts TTS to ~0.6Ă— the UI credit rate). Now matches elevenlabs.io/pricing/api:
- `eleven_v3`: $0.166 â†’ **$0.10/1k** (0.602 cr/char measured) â€” *fixes a live ~66% overcharge*
- `eleven_flash_v2_5`: $0.083 â†’ **$0.05/1k** (0.301 cr/char) â€” *live fix*
- `eleven-multilingual-v2`: $0.166 â†’ **$0.10/1k** (0.601 cr/char)
- `eleven-sfx`: **$0.004/s** (24 cr/s measured), one exact per-second rate; caps at 30s = $0.12, matching ElevenLabs' "per generation" price
- All `priceMultiplier: 1` (at-cost). No `output_format` for SFX â€” it would make the byte-based duration billing vary by format (variable pricing).

### Other fixes (from review)
- TTS input cap 4096 â†’ 10000 (schema + `generateSpeech` guard) for multilingual's 10k limit.
- SFX `duration` floor lowered (schema min 3 â†’ 0.5).
- `polli-cli` SKILL.md: added SFX + multilingual examples.

### Verification
Empirical (live ElevenLabs): generation for both models, `loop`/`prompt_influence`/short-duration SFX, 5.6k-char multilingual, usage headers, Tinybird billing (multilingual 5625 chars â†’ $0.5625 at the new rate), alias resolution, field-parity. Full suite green: gen 404/404, typecheck clean, price snapshot updated (exactly v3/flash/multilingual repriced).

gist.headline: Buzzes, beeps, and cheaper speech
gist.blurb: We've added ElevenLabs Sound Effects and Multilingual v2 to the audio API. Plus, we crunched the numbers and dropped ElevenLabs TTS prices across the board to match exact API costs.
gist.summary: Added ElevenLabs text-to-sound-effects (`eleven-sfx`) and Multilingual v2 (`eleven-multilingual-v2`) models, increased the TTS input cap to 10,000 characters, and reduced ElevenLabs TTS pricing to at-cost (e.g., v3 dropped from $0.166 to $0.10 per 1k characters).
gist.impact: Users can now generate sound effects via the audio API, use 29 languages with the new multilingual model, and pay ~40% less for all ElevenLabs speech generation.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a foley artist or DJ, wearing headphones and using a soundboard, representing the new sound effects and audio models.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing tiny DJ headphones, hovering over a retro soundboard with glowing lime green (#ecf874) sliders and buttons. Floating pixelated sound waves and musical notes surround her. Soft pastel lavender and cream gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
